title: juncus alpinus subsp. australis
intro: Juncus alpinus subsp. australis, also known as the Alpine Rush or Australian Alpine Rush, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Juncus, a group of sedges native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus alpinus subsp. australis include the treatment of various health conditions such as colds, fever, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Juncus alpinus subsp. australis are typically made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction for medicinal use.
